seo.title: About Us | {{company}}
seo.description: Learn more about {{company}} — a modern web studio helping businesses grow through website development, SEO foundations, and Google Ads.

hero.title: We build websites focused on real business growth
hero.description: Codevix Studio helps businesses launch online through modern website development, SEO-ready architecture, and Google Ads strategies designed to attract real customers.

story.title: Helping businesses grow online
story.text1: We believe every business deserves a professional online presence — not only large companies. Our goal is to help businesses launch modern websites and attract customers through effective digital solutions.
story.text2: We combine development, SEO foundations, and Google Ads strategy into one complete solution focused on long-term business growth and real results.

features.title: Complete digital solutions for modern businesses

development.title: Modern Development
development.description: We create fast, scalable, and responsive websites using modern technologies focused on performance and user experience.

marketing.title: Google Ads & Marketing
marketing.description: We help businesses attract customers through Google Ads campaigns, keyword research, and conversion-focused strategies.

growth.title: Growth Focused
growth.description: We build websites designed not only to look modern, but also to support business growth and long-term online visibility.

support.title: Long-Term Support
support.description: Clients working with us on advertising receive ongoing website support, updates, and continuous improvements.

yurii.description: Focused on building modern high-performance websites with scalable architecture, clean code, and strong SEO foundations.

oksana.description: Helping businesses grow through Google Ads campaigns, performance optimization, analytics, and digital marketing strategies.

cta.title: Ready to grow your business online?
cta.description: We combine development, advertising, and modern technologies to help businesses launch faster and grow more effectively online.
